Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Vorsran.
  2. Defeat 1 Nexar Elite Edge lvl 122.

Quest Text

Description

The Nexar Elite is made up by the best fighters in the Nexar Fleet. The Edge type are fitted with a Heave Wave Generator, a dreadful siege weapon. They prefer to hide behind Nexar ships. So, make sure you clear out all support before engaging one of these.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
